title: pinus cembroides subsp. monophylla
intro: Pinus cembroides subsp. monophylla, also known as the single-leaf piñon or monophylla piñon, is a type of evergreen coniferous tree that belongs to the pine family. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Pinus cembroides subsp. monophylla include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support immune function. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used to make medicinal products such as salves, ointments, and tinctures.
